raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The opioid epidemic is increasingly being fueled by the rise of fentanyl, a synthetic opioid which is now the leading cause of opioid related deaths.",
    "Fentanyl is one of the most dangerous and deadly substances in the world – just 2 milligrams is enough to kill.",
    "In the last three years, fentanyl deaths in California have risen by 541% and 37% of all drug-related deaths involve fentanyl.",
    "Three out of four children are found dead in their beds by their parents due to fentanyl poisoning.",
    "Reports have shown that in California drug-related fatalities have risen 50% since 2017, much of this driven by the emergence of fentanyl.",
    "California seized more fentanyl in 2019 than any other state in the nation, according to the U.S. Drug Enforcement Administration.",
    "AB 1351 and SB 75 aim to align fentanyl trafficking with cocaine and heroin in California’s criminal code.",
    "Fentanyl is cut into other opioids, leading to higher rates of mortality in unaware users.",
    "Fentanyl poses a threat to public safety like no other drug we have seen.",
    "Fentanyl is used to produce counterfeit pills which are ingested by unsuspecting victims."
  ]
}
```
